creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

fresh 8-STABLE build, Skype sound works, but "Visit account page" yields
this on standard output or error, and does not cause any other visible
action (like starting a browser or such):

/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Cannot open "/usr/lib/libv4l/v4l2convert.so"

Requested information:

compat.linux.oss_version: 198144
compat.linux.osrelease: 2.6.16
OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT=f10

All ports fully up to date.
